repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex references component implementation names as if they were expressions -> Replace Q.Impl with Data_Sink in the data_routing assumption
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex references component implementation names as if they were expressions -> Replace P.Impl with Data_Source in the sporadic_dispatch guarantee
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex references component implementation names as if they were expressions -> Replace Q.Impl with 10 in the execution_period guarantee
line 68: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex references component implementation names as if they were expressions -> Replace Q.Impl with 10 in the deadline guarantee
line 69: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex references component implementation names as if they were expressions -> Replace Q.Impl with 1 in the priority guarantee

line 65: named thing must be an expression with a type: Data_Sink = Data_Sink is not a valid AGREE expression; port names cannot be used in equality expressions without proper context -> Replace Data_Sink = Data_Sink with true
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Source': Data_Source is not visible in the Q component type scope -> Remove guarantee 'sporadic_dispatch': Q.Impl = Data_Source
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl': Q.Impl is not a valid expression in this context -> Remove guarantee 'sporadic_dispatch': Q.Impl = Data_Source
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl': Q.Impl is not a valid expression in this context -> Remove guarantee 'execution_period': Q.Impl = 10
line 67: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Invalid expression due to unresolved reference to Q.Impl -> Remove guarantee 'execution_period': Q.Impl = 10
Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything: Undefined property reference in annex -> Remove or define Source_Data_Size property association
